top_signals.title: UAE’s Oil Output Surged to Record High in June, IEA Says
top_signals.summary: The United Arab Emirates boosted crude oil production to an all-time high last month, the most compelling evidence yet of how Abu Dhabi responded more boldly than any of its Persian Gulf neighbors to disruption caused by the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BMW’s Car Sales Decline After 30% Plunge in China
top_signals.summary: BMW AG’s car sales fell in the second quarter due to an accelerating slump in China, where a property crisis is hurting demand for luxury cars.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DOJ charges federal inmate over alleged theft of $290,000 in crypto forfeited to US government
top_signals.summary: Federal inmate Rossen Iossifov faces new charges for allegedly taking $290,000 in government-forfeited cryptocurrency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China successfully tests sea-based rocket booster recovery system
top_signals.summary: The test marks China's first successful retrieval of an orbital-class rocket, as Beijing hopes to break U.S. dominance in the reusable technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Eleven dead, 19 missing as Spain wildfire roars through village
top_signals.summary: Authorities said many of the victims might be foreign tourists but that they were still confirming their identities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest buys $14 million worth of Circle, offloads Robinhood shares
top_signals.summary: Circle Internet Group's stock dropped 1.65% during Thursday's trading session, extending its one-month decline to 20.2%.
